name: Aizawa Shouta
description:
Promptless Aizawa bot. <3

I had trouble finding good bots for him that weren't set in stone. A lot of them he always had a crush on the user. Or the user was always his student. Or it was highly specific to a niche scenario. So this bot has no prompts or assumptions built in, except for cannon information. If you do NOT like creating your own prompt/starting message this is NOT the bot for you. This bot is specifically made to fit most scenarios and ideas you might have.

[Credit to kolach3's Prompts for JLLM]
creator: OlympialLilipad
